files.description: Policy engine with ALLOW/DENY/REQUIRE_APPROVAL/EMERGENCY_STOP decisions across 4 industrial levels
Risk/Impact/Confidence score calculator with weighted factor analysis

vectors_tested: Level 4 critical command without dual approval → DENY
Emergency stop trigger → halt all operations

acceptance.notes: P5 Industrial Hardening overlay complete. Safety Policy Engine enforces 4-level risk matrix with ALLOW/DENY/APPROVAL/ESTOP. Risk calculator provides weighted Risk/Impact/Confidence scores. 6 compliance profiles (ISO27001, SOC2, NIST, IEC62443, ISA95, IEC61511) load and apply correctly. Incident Center UI (4 components) provides alert management, recovery tracking, audit trail viewer, and compliance export. 45 safety tests passing. CORE FREEZE maintained — zero imports from core/ or releases/. Full suite: 411/411 tests passing across 48 files.
